name: io.github.banksynchq/banksync
description: Connect AI agents to bank accounts, transactions, balances, and investment data. Sync financial data to Notion, Google Sheets, and Airtable.

environment_variables.name: BANKSYNC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your BankSync API key from https://banksync.io/developers

environment_variables.name: BANKSYNC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your BankSync API key from https://banksync.io/developers

tools.name: get_data_type_schema
tools.description: Get available source fields for a data type — use before building fieldMappings

tools.name: list_feed_sources
tools.description: List supported feed source types and their data type combinations

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all workspaces the authenticated user belongs to

tools.name: get_workspace
tools.description: Get workspace name, plan, and settings

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: List connected destination integrations (Notion, Sheets, Airtable)

tools.name: delete_integration
tools.description: Remove a destination integration from a workspace

tools.name: list_banks
tools.description: List connected bank/institution connections for a workspace

tools.name: get_bank
tools.description: Get a bank connection and its live accounts from the institution

tools.name: create_bank_link
tools.description: Initiate a new bank connection — returns authorization URL

tools.name: connect_bank
tools.description: Complete a Plaid bank connection with a public_token

tools.name: delete_bank
tools.description: Remove a bank connection from a workspace

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: Fetch live accounts for a bank connection from the institution

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Fetch a single account's current details from the institution

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Fetch bank transactions for an account with date range or cursor sync

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Fetch the current live balance for an account

tools.name: get_holdings
tools.description: Get current investment holdings for an investment account

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Get investment transactions for an investment account

tools.name: get_loan
tools.description: Get loan details for a loan or liability account

tools.name: list_feeds
tools.description: List all data pipeline feeds in a workspace

tools.name: get_feed
tools.description: Get full configuration and status of a feed pipeline

tools.name: create_feed
tools.description: Create a new data pipeline feed

tools.name: update_feed
tools.description: Update a feed's configuration or schedule

tools.name: validate_feed
tools.description: Pre-flight validate a feed configuration without creating it

tools.name: delete_feed
tools.description: Permanently delete a feed and its job history

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List sync job history for a feed

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Get status and progress of a specific sync job

tools.name: trigger_sync
tools.description: Queue a new sync job for a feed

tools.name: cancel_job
tools.description: Cancel a queued or in-progress sync job
